message:
Add hover-triggered re-scramble to DecodingText for interactive feel

After the initial entrance animation completes and the text has fully resolved,
hovering over the text now triggers a brief 500ms re-scramble that resolves
back to the final string. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps updates,
same as the entrance animation. The scramble pool remains strictly numeric
(0-9) with tabular-nums CSS to guarantee zero layout shift during the effect.

Also guards the initial placeholder (text replaced with "0"s) behind the
isDone flag so that if the component re-renders after the entrance animation
has already completed, it doesn't flash a wall of zeros before snapping back
to the resolved text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
